airsend scroll chat · Esc clear · join to connect
disconnected
code
share this code
—
or join a room
chat
>
send file

uploads a file over QUIC to the relay configured in settings. same transport as airsend -f.

no file selected 

    

  


  
  

    

      
send text

      

        uploads a text/script payload over QUIC to the relay. peers download
        it with airsend -r <code> or from this app's
        receive tab.
      

      
      
      
      

        
        
      

      

    

  


  
  

    

      
receive

      

        downloads a file from the relay by code. files save to
        ~/Downloads.
      

      

        
        
      

      

        
        
      

      

    

  


  
  

    

      

        
settings

        
      


      

        
relay

        

          remote server used for chat. default connects to
          airsend.4rji.com:443.
        

        

          
          
        

      


      

        
local server

        

          required for file send/receive. starts
          airsend -sw locally.
